Paleo Restaurants in Sanford

Which paleo spots in Sanford grade cleanest?8 of these 12 hold an A; SONNY'S BBQ tops them at a perfect 100/100.

12 paleo restaurants

  • A 100 C
    CORNER CAFE - HOME OF GOURMET2GO American ★ 4.6 (743) Sanford · Seminole County GFDF +3 more Inspected Apr 2026
